rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value exemptions. Educ. Code §21.067 governs educator preparation materials and training. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 21.067. EDUCATOR PREPARATION MATERIALS AND TRAINING.
_note: No relationship between the proposed tax-code change and this education-code provision.
